'''鈭歱-dh-ng''' ('''padhanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lime|lime]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lime|lime]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-dh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| padhanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:padhangithi|padhangithi]] || [[word:padhangiji|padhangiji]] || [[word:padhangishi|padhangishi]] || [[word:padhangi|padhangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhanguthuth|padhanguthuth]] || [[word:padhangujuj|padhangujuj]] || [[word:padhangushush|padhangushush]] || [[word:padhang|padhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhanguthu|padhanguthu]] || [[word:padhanguju|padhanguju]] || [[word:padhangushu|padhangushu]] || [[word:padhangu|padhangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhangufuth|padhangufuth]] || [[word:padhangufuj|padhangufuj]] || [[word:padhangufush|padhangufush]] || [[word:padhanguf|padhanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:padhangethe|padhangethe]] || [[word:padhangeje|padhangeje]] || [[word:padhangeshe|padhangeshe]] || [[word:padhange|padhange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhangothoth|padhangothoth]] || [[word:padhangojoj|padhangojoj]] || [[word:padhangoshosh|padhangoshosh]] || [[word:padhang|padhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhangotho|padhangotho]] || [[word:padhangojo|padhangojo]] || [[word:padhangosho|padhangosho]] || [[word:padhango|padhango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhangofoth|padhangofoth]] || [[word:padhangofoj|padhangofoj]] || [[word:padhangofosh|padhangofosh]] || [[word:padhangof|padhangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:padhang忙th忙|padhang忙th忙]] || [[word:padhang忙j忙|padhang忙j忙]] || [[word:padhang忙sh忙|padhang忙sh忙]] || [[word:padhang忙|padhang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhangathath|padhangathath]] || [[word:padhangajaj|padhangajaj]] || [[word:padhangashash|padhangashash]] || [[word:padhang|padhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhangatha|padhangatha]] || [[word:padhangaja|padhangaja]] || [[word:padhangasha|padhangasha]] || [[word:padhanga|padhanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhangafath|padhangafath]] || [[word:padhangafaj|padhangafaj]] || [[word:padhangafash|padhangafash]] || [[word:padhangaf|padhangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:padhangasha|padhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopadhangasha|gopadhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipadhangasha|gokipadhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:padhangn眉sha|padhangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopadhangnkn眉sha|gopadhangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhangn眉sha|gokipadhangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:padhangsh毛sha|padhangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopadhangnksh毛sha|gopadhangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipadhangsh毛sha|gokipadhangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhangrosha|padhangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhangnkrosha|gopadhangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhangrosha|gokipadhangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:padhangmusha|padhangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhangnkmusha|gopadhangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhangmusha|gokipadhangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:padhangsherasha|padhangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopadhangnksherasha|gopadhangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipadhangsherasha|gokipadhangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:padhangasha|padhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopadhangnkngasha|gopadhangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipadhangasha|gokipadhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:padhangyasha|padhangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopadhangnkyasha|gopadhangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipadhangyasha|gokipadhangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:padhangyamasha|padhangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopadhangnkyamasha|gopadhangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipadhangyamasha|gokipadhangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:padhangn眉sh毛sha|padhangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopadhangnkn眉sh毛sha|gopadhangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipadhangn眉sh毛sha|gokipadhangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhangn眉rosha|padhangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhangnkn眉rosha|gopadhangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhangn眉rosha|gokipadhangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhangn眉musha|padhangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhangnkn眉musha|gopadhangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhangn眉musha|gokipadhangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:padhangsh毛n眉sha|padhangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopadhangnksh毛n眉sha|gopadhangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhangsh毛n眉sha|gokipadhangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhangsh毛rosha|padhangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhangnksh毛rosha|gopadhangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhangsh毛rosha|gokipadhangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhangsh毛musha|padhangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhangnksh毛musha|gopadhangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhangsh毛musha|gokipadhangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:padhangron眉sha|padhangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopadhangnkron眉sha|gopadhangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhangron眉sha|gokipadhangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:padhangrosh毛sha|padhangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopadhangnkrosh毛sha|gopadhangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipadhangrosh毛sha|gokipadhangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhangromusha|padhangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhangnkromusha|gopadhangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhangromusha|gokipadhangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:padhangmun眉sha|padhangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopadhangnkmun眉sha|gopadhangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhangmun眉sha|gokipadhangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:padhangmush毛sha|padhangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopadhangnkmush毛sha|gopadhangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipadhangmush毛sha|gokipadhangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhangmurosha|padhangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhangnkmurosha|gopadhangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhangmurosha|gokipadhangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:padhang|padhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙dh忙ng|p忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopadhang|hopadhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙dh忙ng|hop忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopadhang|hohopadhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙dh忙ng|hohop忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉padhang|n眉padhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙dh忙ng|n眉p忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉padhang|n眉n眉padhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙dh忙ng|n眉n眉p忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂padhang|n茂padhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙dh忙ng|n茂p忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂padhang|n茂n茂padhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙dh忙ng|n茂n茂p忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupadhang|lupadhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙dh忙ng|lup忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupadhang|lulupadhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙dh忙ng|lulup忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipadhang|lipadhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙dh忙ng|lip忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipadhang|lilipadhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙dh忙ng|lilip忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopadhang|kopadhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙dh忙ng|kop忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopadhang|kokopadhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙dh忙ng|kokop忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepadhang|kepadhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙dh忙ng|kep忙dh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepadhang|kekepadhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙dh忙ng|kekep忙dh忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
